g.text: turn any Kubernetes cluster into a private serverless platform
Apply the CRDs + operator to the current kube-context
Create or update an ElpioService from a YAML file
Tail logs for an ElpioService's pods (-f to follow)
Delete an ElpioService by name or from a YAML file
Run the Elpio operator (kopf) in the foreground
apply the CRDs + operator to the cluster
run the reconciler in the foreground
